task_summaries.task_scope: Measure correlation stability of packet length and related feature pairs across benign and DDoS classes using evidence refs e13 to e22
Analyze shortcut-like predictive leverage arising from strong linear dependencies among packet length features in the dataset
Assess redundancy impact of correlated packet length features on effective dataset dimensionality using evidence refs e13 to e22
Compare dependency patterns of packet length and related features between benign and DDoS classes to detect shifts or stability
